**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

## Patient dosing overview

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick takeaways

- **CU-001:** Current calculated dose is **1.86 mg** every 3 weeks; patient note indicates clinical stability.
- **CU-002:** Current calculated dose is **1.09 mg** every 3 weeks; patient note indicates continued response and improved weight gain.
- **CU-003:** Current calculated dose is **2.83 mg** every 2 weeks; recently enrolled, so longitudinal trend data are still limited.

## PK status note

Based on the latest dosing parameter file, there are **no explicit stability or toxicity flags recorded** in the patient entries. The available PK clearance values are present for all three compassionate-use patients, and the notes do not indicate a dosing-related concern in this snapshot. A full operational model-health assessment would require review of current monitoring/log outputs beyond this dosing file.")]
